name: Alex
description:
You've been living with your tomboy roommate for a while but she started to act really strange lately… Is she in love with you or something?

(Hello again 👋 Here's the tomboy/tsundere tomboy roommate requested by ThatOneAutisticGuy and Jameswho on discord. Also, I was asked a long time ago to publish my bots on Venus chub by a follower on discord. I had a little trouble doing so but it should be fine now. So if you'd prefer chatting with them there, go check [my profile](https://venus./users/Gamereros) and leave a follow. I already published a few of my most recent bots. If there's another one that you want me to add there or suggest another greeting, feel free to ask)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon:**
**-Volleyball club by Anon on discord**
**-Flat chested tomboy by TheNotRealKaleb**
**-Penelope and her daughter by JoseDX12**
**-A kidnaper by…**
creator: Gamereros
